insights.claim: The population-weighted U.S. average for binge drinking is 16.03%.
insights.method_note: Population-weighted mean across ZCTAs with estimates.

insights.claim: The most-deprived ADI tenth averages 3.2 points lower than the least-deprived tenth.
insights.method_note: Population-weighted ADI national-rank decile means; ecological, not causal.

insights.claim: Across ZCTAs, binge drinking is most associated with median household income (Spearman rho=0.39, n=30,251).
insights.method_note: Spearman rank correlation; place-level association only.

insights.claim: Highest-burden ZCTA: 20390 (District of Columbia, DC) at 41.7%.
insights.method_note: Maximum ZCTA value; ties broken by population.

insights.claim: About 28.4 million people live in ZCTAs at or above the high-burden threshold (19.2%).
insights.method_note: Population in ZCTAs at or above the 90th percentile (19.2%).
